title: 万に一つもなかったこと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Rice Shower trains for the upcoming
Takarazuka Kinen, she is recognized by people in
the street, and hears their support firsthand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her fanbase, she manages to win the
fan popularity poll and is invited to the
Takaruzuka Kinen's opening ceremony at the
Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We attend a rehearsal for the event, where an
accident at the racecourse results in me getting
injured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the cause of the accident remains unclear, it is
decided that the Takarazuka Kinen must be
canceled to avoid another incident.
